Free shipping on orders over $175.

Returns accepted within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn and in original condition with all tags attached.

To initiate a return, contact us at support@lgcyclothing.com with your order number.

Please refer to our size guide for detailed measurements. Sizes run true to size ΟΔβ²§βÄù when in doubt, size up.

Machine wash cold with like colours. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach. Do not dry clean. Iron on low heat.

settings.heading: Care Instructions
settings.content: LGCYCLOTHING products are built to last. Please wear and wash them with care to make the most of every piece.
